description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the base/archlinux Docker image and a before_script that runs `pacman -Syy python2 python2-pip --needed --noconfirm` followed by `pip2 install -r requirements_dev.txt`. Define a single stage called test. Add a job named run_pylint in the test stage that executes the command `pytest`. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined, and the pipeline relies solely on the Arch Linux image and Python 2 environment.
